visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)), subtle and crisp. High-information density requires clear boundaries.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal flat design. Use shadow-sm for cards. Focus states should have ring-2 ring-primary/20
visual_enhancers.textures: Clean flat surfaces. No full-screen gradients.

layouts.login: Split screen layout. Left: Full-height image background with abstract blue architecture. Right: Centered login form with a prominent 'Entrar com o Google' (Login with Google) button.
layouts.dashboard: Persistent Sidebar (260px wide) + Main Content Area. Main content must use a Top Metric Strip (4 KPIs like Total de Alunos, Turmas Ativas, etc.) and a CSS Grid layout below for Recharts and data tables.

components.name: Sidebar
components.instructions: Vertical navigation with lucide-react icons. Include active states with light blue background and primary blue text.

components.name: KPI Card
components.instructions: Use Shadcn Card. Include an icon, a large metric number, and a trend indicator (e.g., '+2.5% em relação ao mês passado' in green).

components.name: Charts
components.instructions: Use Recharts. Line chart for 'Média de Desempenho' (Performance), Bar chart for 'Tarefas Pendentes' (Pending Tasks), Radar chart for 'Análise de Habilidades IA'. Use the custom chart colors.

login_background.description: Abstract blue and white modern architecture building

teacher_avatar.description: Smiling teacher in a blue blazer

instructions_to_main_agent: Language: Entire interface MUST be in Portuguese (Brazilian). E.g., 'Alunos', 'Turmas', 'Visão Geral', 'Desempenho', 'Configurações'.
Icons: Use lucide-react for all dashboard icons.
Mock Data: Simulate Google Classroom API responses with realistic fictitious data for students, classes, and assignments.
AI Insights: Prominently feature 'Insights da IA' tags/badges highlighting predictions (e.g. 'Risco de reprovação' or 'Destaque em exatas').
Charts: Use Recharts for data visualization (LineChart, BarChart, RadarChart).
Routing: Use React Router for Login (/), Dashboard (/dashboard), Alunos (/alunos), Turmas (/turmas), and Aluno Perfil (/alunos/:id).
Install and configure font families `Manrope` and `IBM Plex Sans` in the root CSS/HTML.
Do NOT use HTML <select> or <input type='date'>. Use Shadcn components where applicable.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not make generic centered layouts. Use glass-morphism where appropriate (e.g., sticky headers). Do not apply universal transition (`transition: all`). Create depth with z-index hierarchy and subtle shadows. Do not use AI assistant emojis. Add data-testid to interactive elements. Ensure generous padding (p-6, p-8) and crisp 1px borders for structure.
